title: Red & White Wooden Snowflake Christmas Tree Decorations (12 Pack) with String - Durable & Lightweight Painted MDF Snowflake Shapes (5.5cm x 5.5cm) - Perfect for Christmas Tree Decorations
features: {What’s Included} Each box contains 12 red & white wood snowflakes (6 x red, 6 x white) and 12 pieces of string for immediate hanging.
{Premium Quality} Crafted from durable & lightweight MDF wood with a vibrant red & white paint finish. These wooden snowflakes are made to last, and are naturally resistant to chipping and cracking.
{Ready to Hang} Each wooden snowflake arrives with a pre-cut hole, and has string attached for immediate, easy hanging.

{Versatile Size} Each wooden snowflake measures 5.5cm x 5.5cm with a slim 3mm thickness. Each piece of string is approximately 20cm in length, making it long enough to hang around a Christmas Tree branch.
{Perfect Christmas Decoration} These snowflakes are perfect as Christmas Tree Decorations, or just as Christmas Decorations around the home!
description: Red & White Wooden Snowflake Christmas Tree Decorations (12 Pack) with String. What's Included: - 6 x White Wooden Snowflakes with White String - 6 x Red Wooden Snowflakes with Red String Dimensions: - Wooden Snowflake Width: 5.5cm - Wooden Snowflake Length: 5.5cm - Wooden Snowflake Depth: 3mm - String Length: Approx 20cm Materials: - Wood - String Premium Quality Wood: Made from durable, lightweight painted MDF wood with a smooth & vibrant red & white finish. Easy to Hang: Each snowflake arrives with the string already attached, so they’re ready to hang immediately. Versatile Size: Each snowflake measures (5.5cm x 5.5cm x 3mm). Ideal Decorations: These snowflakes are perfect as Christmas Tree Decorations & more! Arrives in a cellophane wrapped wooden box.
